query:
SELECT ap.id as ae_id, ap.name, mm.year, mm.month, mm.arr_usd, mm.demos_total, mm.dials_pw, mm.demos_pw
FROM ae_profiles ap
JOIN monthly_metrics mm ON mm.ae_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.name LIKE '%Joe%' OR ap.name LIKE '%Payne%'
ORDER BY mm.year DESC, mm.month DESC
LIMIT 12;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute
